name: firmware-iwlwifi
title: firmware-iwlwifi
summary: Binary firmware for Intel Wireless cards
description:
Binary firmware for Intel Wireless cards
This package contains the binary firmware for Intel Wireless cards
supported by the iwl3945, iwl4965, and iwlwifi drivers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use firmware-iwlwifi because Binary firmware for Intel Wireless cards.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use firmware-iwlwifi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair firmware-iwlwifi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `firmware-iwlwifi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
